scripts.dev:electron: bun run --filter @cushion/types build && bun run --filter electron-app dev
scripts.build: bun run --filter @cushion/types build && bun run --filter frontend build
scripts.build:electron: bun run --filter @cushion/types build && bun run --filter electron-app build
scripts.package:electron: bun run build:electron && bun run --filter electron-app package
scripts.lint: bun run --filter '*' lint && bun run lint:colors && bun run verify:pdfjs-assets
scripts.ci: bun run lint && bun run type-check && bun run test
